_comment: Demo queries — each a distinct intent × capability × language, covering every branch of the agent. run_demo.py sends each to POST /assist and prints the JSON; the vague one triggers a clarifying question, which the runner answers via /assist/resume using its `clarify_answer`.

queries.label: English · cross-lingual search → products (English query, German catalog)
German · comparison → value-ranked (price per unit) + cheapest pick
German · navigational → route to a partner's own search
English · vague → clarifying question, then resume the same thread
German · customer support → hand-off to the partner's real service desk
queries.query: Wo ist meine Bestellung bei dm?

queries.label: German · off-topic → politely declined (out of scope)
